# COMP110 Data Analysis Project

## Overview
This project analyzes how prior coding experience impacts how students perceive the difficulty of the COMP110 course.

## Key Question
How does prior experience relate to course difficulty?

## Findings
- Students with little to no experience reported higher difficulty
- Students with more experience reported lower difficulty
- The course tends to feel moderately to highly difficult overall

## Visualization
(Add your charts here later if needed)

## Conclusion
The data suggests that many students enter the course as beginners, so adding more beginner-friendly instruction, step-by-step examples, and optional review resources could improve student confidence and performance.

## Reflection
This project helped me understand how data can reveal patterns in student experience and guide improvements in course design.
